rejected_intermediate_problems: A short-prose pass removed the target splits but introduced replacement splits such as 'con- / version', 'DI- / NOv2', 'pre- / serves', and 'In- / ternNav'.
A no-hyphenation pass removed splits but produced visibly stretched justified spacing and broke metadata extraction by leaving '=10000=10000' in the plain-text abstract.
The accepted local setting uses ragged-right abstract text without numeric TeX penalty commands, so metadata extraction remains clean.

change_summary.summary: Rewrote the abstract with shorter ACL-style prose, protected selected model/system names, used a local ragged-right abstract setting to avoid first-page abstract hyphenation, and synchronized the OpenReview metadata packet.
change_summary.final_wording_required_phrase: scores 27/30 original versus 29/30 converted normalized-1000 point hits

observations: The final page-1 text layer removes the targeted abstract splits: 'vision- / language', 'Pre- / viewSurface', 'NVIDIA- / baseline', '99- / episode', and 'de- / fine'.
The final abstract keeps the required 'converted normalized-1000 point hits' phrase without breaking it in the rendered text layer.
The accepted ragged-right abstract setting leaves a slightly uneven right edge but avoids both visible abstract hyphenation and the wide spacing produced by numeric no-hyphenation penalties.
The final contact sheet remains 11 pages with no obvious float, table, or blank-page regression.

verification.command: bash -c 'if rg -n "Overfull|LaTeX Warning: Label|There were undefined references|Undefined control sequence|multiply-defined|Rerun to get cross-references right|Package lineno Warning" paper/venues/acl27/build/main.log; then exit 1; else printf "no blocker matches\n"; fi'

verification.result: ok true; title and abstract match metadata; abstract word count 168
